Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9007 0 0}Hey. Can anybody use the rooftop planters?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9121 0 0}...Looks like they changed some stuff. Can't believe they gave us something like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, if you wanna do it with me, I'm gonna make sure you do it properly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Don't think you're done once you've planted the seeds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you get impatient... then don't bother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9055 0 0}What? You planted them but you ain't even taking care of them?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you start somethin', you gotta see it through and look after them 'til the end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Well, I wouldn't mind showing you how it's done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9055 0 0}We oughta check in on those rooftop planters...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Looks like you got some free time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9001 0 0}...Hey. You got time? I wanna check on the rooftop planters...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki seems determined...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're comin' too, aren't ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9002 0 0}...Did you eat the ones you harvested?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}You still wanna do this? I ain't gonna force you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aragaki will gain any[n]more new skills even if I garden with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you got nothin' to do, come with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aragaki will gain any[n]more new skills even if I garden with him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, join me if you're free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tending to the rooftop planters might[n]help improve the quality of the produce...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, join me if you're free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}There any rules about sharing ingredients and dishes we can use? Stuff like that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wanna hear more about the kitchen rules from you... I'll return the favor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Aragaki wants[n]to use the kitchen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Aragaki?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9130 0 0}Tch, I bought too much. Guess I'll freeze 'em...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}What are you standing around for?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki's cooking skills are on par[n]with that of a professional chef...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I get Aragaki to teach me, I might[n]be able to make some delicious food...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9071 0 0}One time, I brought a lost kid at the strip mall to the police station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}It turned out he was the son of a fishmonger, and he thanked me like crazy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Why am I even telling you this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you ain't in a hurry, go wait in the kitchen. I'll be there later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Aragaki wants to[n]do something in the kitchen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}It'll go faster with two people to do it together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aragaki will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you wanna get good, you gotta put in the practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Tch... Don't think I'll go easy on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_052_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki said he wanted to use the kitchen...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free, I want you to show me around the kitchen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Aragaki will gain any[n]more new skills even if I cook with him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Join me if you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with Aragaki?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, join me if you have some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT_DORMITORY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I don't think I've planted[n]anything in the rooftop planters yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_THINK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I plant...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it can be harvested on {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_CAN_NOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I won't be able to harvest it[n]before the Promised Day, January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should still be produce in the rooftop[n]planter that has yet to be harvested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should harvest those first...[n]{f 1 1}
